title: Frog Knight
move_pattern: Starts with Tongue Lash. Cycles: Tongue Lash → Strike Down Evil → For the Queen → [conditional: if already beetle charged or HP >= 50%, Tongue Lash; else Beetle Charge (once only)] → Tongue Lash loop. After Beetle Charge is used once, it is replaced by Tongue Lash permanently.
notes: Beetle Charge is a one-time move used only when HP drops below 50% and has not yet been used. Once used, the pattern reverts to Tongue Lash in that slot. Plating is applied on spawn.
